notes: Share tool migrated to resource-scoped operations (dataset_create/dataset_accept/app_create/...); app link expiry can now be updated via app_update (omitted keeps, 0 clears, positive restarts the countdown); link visibility is fixed at creation - revoke and recreate the link to change it
